All track data, sorting, dates, notes, file info, and era organization come from the Yeat Trackër / Yeat Hub community. I only cleaned it up and presented it in this site format — I am not claiming credit for their research.

Data source: the community-maintained Yeat Trackër Google Sheet. The sheet credits the Yeat Hub Discord and lists the contributors below.
